query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS library_usage_events (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  user_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  event_type ENUM('strategy_generated','strategy_regenerated','initiative_selected','initiative_deselected','cost_envelope_viewed','value_envelope_viewed','risk_evaluated','pdf_exported') NOT NULL,
  library_version VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  initiative_ids_json TEXT,
  sector_id VARCHAR(36),
  occurred_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_lue_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_lue_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_lue_event_type (event_type),
  INDEX idx_lue_occurred_at (occurred_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS content_requests (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  user_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  request_type ENUM('new_initiative','update_initiative','new_source','update_source','new_risk_rule','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  related_initiative_id VARCHAR(100),
  related_source_id VARCHAR(100),
  priority ENUM('low','medium','high') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  status ENUM('open','under_review','accepted','declined','done') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  admin_notes TEXT,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  resolved_by_user_id VARCHAR(36),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_cr_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_cr_status (status),
  INDEX idx_cr_created_at (created_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS initiative_status_history (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  strategy_initiative_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  strategy_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  initiative_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  from_status ENUM('not_started','in_progress','paused','completed','cancelled'),
  to_status ENUM('not_started','in_progress','paused','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  changed_by_user_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  changed_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_ish_strategy_initiative (strategy_initiative_id),
  INDEX idx_ish_strategy (strategy_id),
  INDEX idx_ish_changed_at (changed_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS strategy_milestones (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  strategy_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  phase ENUM('foundation','build','scale','optimise') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  related_initiative_id VARCHAR(100),
  due_date VARCHAR(10),
  completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completed_by_user_id VARCHAR(36),
  status ENUM('pending','in_progress','completed','overdue') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  sort_order INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_auto_generated TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_sm_strategy (strategy_id),
  INDEX idx_sm_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_sm_phase (phase),
  INDEX idx_sm_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS assessment_history (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  user_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  assessment_type ENUM('initial','reassessment','quarterly_review') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'initial',
  overall_score DOUBLE NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  domain_scores_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  selected_initiative_ids_json TEXT,
  library_version VARCHAR(20),
  assessed_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  INDEX idx_ah_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_ah_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_ah_assessed_at (assessed_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS strategy_refresh_suggestions (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  trigger_type ENUM('capability_progression','library_version_update','milestone_completion','manual') NOT NULL,
  trigger_detail TEXT,
  current_library_version VARCHAR(20),
  latest_library_version VARCHAR(20),
  previous_score DOUBLE,
  current_score DOUBLE,
  status ENUM('pending','dismissed','snoozed','acted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  snoozed_until TIMESTAMP NULL,
  acted_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  acted_by_user_id VARCHAR(36),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_srs_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_srs_status (status),
  INDEX idx_srs_created_at (created_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS manager_briefs (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  strategy_context_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  manager_function VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  brief_markdown TEXT NOT NULL,
  initiative_ids_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  library_version VARCHAR(20),
  generated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  generated_by_user_id VARCHAR(36),
  INDEX idx_mb_tenant_function (tenant_id, manager_function),
  INDEX idx_mb_strategy_ctx (strategy_context_id)
)
